ops.text: codex-ask broke mid-session: /opt/homebrew/bin/codex-ask (cask 1.3.4) exits 126 / "cannot read developer instructions at /opt/homebrew/Caskroom/codex-ask/AGENTS.md" — it expects an AGENTS.md beside the cask binary that the Homebrew install does not provision. Earlier dispatches in the same session worked, so a cask autobump likely swapped the layout mid-session (codex plugin 1.3.4 released today). Cost: one dead speculative-fix lane, re-dispatched to opus. Fix the cask to ship/locate its AGENTS.md, or make codex-ask fall back gracefully when it is absent.
